{"code":"(def result

        :let [issue (linear__get_issue {:id linear-id})

        :when (not= state "done")]
    {:pr-number pr-num :linear-id linear-id :linear-state state}))

{"code":"(def linear-issues-map
  (zipmap linear-ids-nonull linear-issues))

  (filter
    (fn [pr]
      (let [lid (:closes_linear pr)]
        (and lid (not= "done" (:state (get linear-issues-map lid))))))
    prs-with-linear))
